title: S1.1 GRADUATE: move observatory/{engine,contract,producers,cli} from loa-freeside by PR
description: Acceptance: PR open; obs sim --seed 42 byte-matches veve vector FROM the new home; engine opens file:// locally. loa-freeside copy untouched until merge.

title: S1.2 Shell skeleton: app/observatory/ same-origin iframe + agentation dev-only + /api/sim clamps + token bucket
description: Acceptance: next build green; iframe renders engine; /api/sim?seed=42 byte-matches vector; agentation toolbar dev only. Per SDD §5.

title: S1.3 A-2 checkpoint: OPERATOR REVIEW — crs accepts app per IMP-001 or freeside-observatory fallback fires
description: DISPATCH GATE: S2 work order may not OPEN until this decision is logged in decisions.md. Decision owner = operator at S1 review. Trigger criteria: (a) CI path rules reject app/, (b) build tooling conflicts, (c) maintainer veto.

title: S1.4 k-hole loiter diagnosis (R-6, IMP-004 structured format)
description: Structured: {symptom, evidence (paths/lines), root_cause, verdict_on_A3: confirmed|disproven|inconclusive} in decisions.md. If disproven/inconclusive → IMP-005 one-day re-grounding spike updates SDD §3.3 BEFORE S3.4 may close. Gates S3.4.

title: S1.5 VERIFY.md scaffold (G-2 checklist) + CI placeholder job (selftest + vectors)
description: File exists; CI placeholder job runs selftest + vectors. Empty rows for every SDD §4 doctrine beat.

title: S3 re-grounding spike (IMP-005): update SDD §3.3 clew mechanics — watchdog trigger is non-convergence/budget-exhaustion, not non-liveness
description: A-3 DISPROVEN at S1.4 (decisions.md): loiterer was fully live; livenessVerdict alone would not fire. Clew mechanics must add budget/convergence dimension (calls-ceiling-exceeded → watchdog clew). One-day spike, BLOCKS S3.4 closure. Evidence: obs-design-20260612 manifest calls_ceiling=2 vs actual 68.
